title: cirsium hydrophilum var. vaseyi
intro: Cirsium hydrophilum var. vaseyi, also known as Vasey's cirsium or western water thistle, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Cirsium hydrophilum var. vaseyi include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Cirsium hydrophilum var. vaseyi is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
